info.title: Caxur API
info.description:
Clean Architecture REST API with Axum and SQLx

This API follows the JSON:API v1.1 specification for all responses.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description:
Sort fields (comma-separated, prefix with - for descending) (future use)
Example: "created_at" or "-created_at,email"

get.summary: Get all permissions for a role

post.summary: Attach a permission to a role
